about.title: Our Story
about.p1: Our name is no coincidence. In the 15th century, Sufi monks in the monasteries of Yemen were the first to drink coffee systematically, discovering that it helped them remain awake through long nights of prayer and meditation. From those silent cloisters, the drink travelled to Cairo, Constantinople and eventually conquered the world. Monasteries were, above all else, the first places where the ritual of preparing and sharing a drink became an art.
about.p2: At Monasterio we honour that heritage. The reflective pause, the care in the craft, the magic that happens when a well-conceived space brings people together. Only here, on the front line of the Mediterranean, the ritual is the cocktail — artisan gins, limited-edition bourbons and local Mallorcan produce that captures the essence of the island.
about.p3: Our bartenders, trained in the world's finest cocktail bars, elevate every combination to a work of art. Like those monks who perfected the coffee ritual with devotion and precision, we dedicate every glass to the pleasure of the senses. Welcome to Monasterio.
